This is a list of Telugu-language films produced in Telugu cinema in India that are released/scheduled to be released in the year 2026.

Box office collection

[edit]

The List of highest-grossing Telugu films released in 2026, by worldwide box office gross revenue, are as follows: The rank of the films in the following table depends on the estimate of worldwide collections as reported by organizations classified as green by Wikipedia.[a] There is no official tracking of domestic box office figures within India.

  Background shading indicates that a film is currently showing in theatres worldwide.
# Indicates that the film is multilingual and the gross collection figure includes the worldwide collection of the other simultaneously filmed version.
Highest worldwide gross of 2026
Rank Title Production company Worldwide gross Ref.
1 Peddi * Vriddhi Cinemas ₹331.10 crore [b]
2 Mana Shankara Vara Prasad Garu Shine Screens / Gold Box Entertainments ₹300–310 crore [c]
3 The RajaSaab People Media Factory / IVY Entertainment ₹208.38 crore [6]
4 Anaganaga Oka Raju Sithara Entertainments / Fortune Four Cinemas ₹100.20 crore [7]
5 Ustaad Bhagat Singh Mythri Movie Makers ₹95 crore [8]
6 Dacoit: A Love Story S. S. Creations / Suniel Narang Productions ₹55.23 crore # [9]
7 Maa Inti Bangaaram * Tralala Moving Pictures ₹46.04 crore [10][11]
8 Nari Nari Naduma Murari AK Entertainments / Adventures International Pvt Ltd ₹36 crore [12]
9 Raakaasa Pink Elephant Pictures / Zee Studios ₹27 crore [13]
10 Vishnu Vinyasam Sree Subrahmanyeshwara Cinemas ₹18 crore [14]

  1. ^ The film was produced in both Telugu and Hindi simultaneously.
  2. ^ The film was shot in both Telugu and Kannada simultaneously.
